{{Infobox group
| name = Tanaban clan
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Tanaban clan]] once owned the lush green expanse at the southern edge of the [[Blackflame Empire]] before being driven to extinction by the [[Blackflames]].}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
